schema_notes: v2.1: 10 starting cards (down from 12). Thresholds 4/7/11, reduce-by-1 decay, refill draw model, 4 play turns per rest cycle. root_010 and root_012 moved to draft pool.

cards.name: Tendrils of Reclamation

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points in range 1

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 5 points in range 2, and restore 1 Weave

cards.design_note: Starter cleanse. Top counters one Ravage exactly (2 pts vs 2 pts). Bottom is worth dissolving when a territory is at 6-7 pts (almost Defiled) — 5 pts pulls it back safely. Weave restore sweetens the deal. Root+Mist gives 1 toward each threshold; consistent play across turns builds both.

cards.name: Deep Roots

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 3, then reduce Corruption by 2 points in that territory

cards.design_note: Presence placement starter. Top is pure network growth — play it every cycle. Bottom is the emergency reach card: range 3 on a 3-2-1 pyramid means anywhere. Worth dissolving when you need to contest a distant territory fast. Single Root element is honest — this card is about placement, not threshold building.

cards.name: Earthen Mending

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points anywhere on the board

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 4 points anywhere, and reduce Corruption by 2 points in an adjacent territory

cards.design_note: Range-0 cleanse works regardless of board state. Double Root is the best threshold fuel in the starting deck — playing this + any other Root card in the same Vigil gives Root x3 minimum, building toward tier 1 (4) by turn 3. Bottom's 6 total points across 2 territories is the biggest cleanse swing in the starting deck.

cards.name: Shiver of the Ancient

bottom.desc: Generate 7 Fear

cards.design_note: Primary fear card. Top's 3 Fear is strong for a starting card — two turns of this plus combat kills can push past the first Fear Action threshold (5). Bottom's 7 Fear is nearly 1.5 Fear Actions in one play, worth dissolving to push past a Dread threshold (15/30/45) or queue multiple actions before a dangerous Tide. Shadow+Mist diversifies away from Root — this card doesn't build Root thresholds but fuels Shadow tier 1 (4) over 2 turns.

cards.name: The Forest Remembers

bottom.desc: Deal 4 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1, then generate 2 Fear

cards.design_note: Fear + damage hybrid. Top generates modest fear while contributing Root+Shadow to the pool. Bottom's 4 damage kills any Marcher (HP 3) or Outrider (HP 2) and wounds Ironclads (HP 5). The 2 bonus Fear compounds with kill Fear (+1 per kill). Worth dissolving when multiple invaders cluster in one territory. Root+Shadow builds toward both thresholds across turns.

cards.name: Spreading Growth

bottom.desc: Place 2 Presence, each in different territories in range 2

cards.design_note: Pure network expansion and the best Root threshold fuel alongside root_003. Double Root means playing both in one Vigil gives Root x4 — tier 1 fires immediately (place 1 more Presence for free). Bottom's 2 Presence in one action is the fastest network expansion in the starting deck. With bottom doubling, this contributes Root x4 alone — guaranteed tier 1 from a single bottom play.

cards.name: Healing Earth

bottom.desc: Restore 3 Weave and reduce Corruption by 2 points anywhere

cards.design_note: The only dedicated Weave recovery in the starting deck. Top is played conservatively every cycle when Weave is under 16. Bottom is the emergency stabilizer: 3 Weave + 2 cleanse when the board is falling apart. With rest-dissolve taxing 1 card per rest, this card's top becomes more valuable over time as the deck thins and you need reliable sustain every cycle.

cards.name: Stir the Sleeping

bottom.desc: Awaken all dormant cards in hand, then generate 2 Fear per card awakened

cards.design_note: Root's hand quality card — critical in the new refill model. With rest-dissolve sending cards dormant AND bottom plays doing the same, dormant cards accumulate fast. Top awakens 1 per turn (play it every cycle). Bottom awakens ALL and generates scaling Fear (3 dormant = 6 Fear). Worth dissolving when 3+ cards are dormant — the Fear spike plus hand recovery is a massive tempo swing. This card becomes MORE valuable as the encounter goes on.

cards.name: Living Wall

bottom.desc: Deal 5 damage to all invaders in one territory in range 1, and shield all Natives in that territory (Shield 2)

cards.design_note: The defensive combat card. Top builds network. Bottom is Root's strongest single-territory combat action: 5 damage kills any Marcher or Outrider outright, wounds Ironclads to 0 HP (exact kill on HP 5). Shield 2 on Natives ensures they survive the next Activate to counter-attack. Void element is rare for Root — it's the cost for raw power. With reduce-by-1 decay, the Void point lingers one turn but won't build to a threshold without dedicated Void play.

cards.name: Reclaim the Soil

top.desc: Place 1 Presence at any existing Presence token (reinforce a territory)

bottom.desc: Reduce Corruption by 6 points in range 1, then place 1 Presence in range 1

cards.design_note: Reinforcement + emergency cleanse. Top's range-0 reinforce stacks presence on key territories for Network Fear. Bottom is the biggest single-target cleanse in the starting deck (6 points — can drop a territory from almost-Defiled to barely-Tainted). Placing presence after cleansing seeds the network. Root+Mist feeds both primary and secondary thresholds.

cards.name: Ancient Pulse

bottom.desc: Restore 2 Weave, generate 3 Fear, and place 1 Presence in range 1

cards.design_note: MOVED TO DRAFT (v2.1). Utility card that does three things modestly. Doesn't build Root thresholds (Mist+Shadow). Better as a draft pick for players who want flexibility and off-element diversity. In the 10-card starting deck, this slot is better used by a focused card.

cards.name: Rootbound

top.desc: Place 2 Presence at existing Presence (reinforce one territory with 2 tokens)

bottom.desc: Generate Fear equal to 2 x the number of Presence tokens in the highest-presence territory, then restore 1 Weave

cards.design_note: MOVED TO DRAFT (v2.1). Network payoff card that scales with presence density. Wasted in encounter 1 with a 10-card deck — you haven't built a network yet. Perfect draft reward after encounter 1 when you have 3-4 presence territories. Top's double-reinforce + bottom's scaling Fear (4 presence = 8 Fear) makes this a build-defining card for wide-network Root runs.

cards.name: Vast Network

bottom.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 3. This turn, Network Fear counts adjacency twice for all Presence territories.

cards.design_note: Draft-only presence card for deep network builds. Bottom's temporary Network Fear doubling is a massive fear spike if you're already well spread. Double Root contributes 4 to the pool on bottom play (doubled) — guarantees Root tier 1.

cards.name: Whisper of Roots

bottom.desc: Generate 3 Fear and reduce Corruption by 1 point in all Presence territories

cards.design_note: Gentle sustain draft card. Bottom's board-wide cleanse (1 point per presence territory) rewards wide presence — synergizes with Spreading Growth builds. Low-commitment draft pick.

cards.name: Creeping Vines

bottom.desc: Move 1 Presence up to 2 territories. All invaders in range 2 have their Advance movement halved this Tide.

cards.design_note: Awakened — first MovePresence and SlowInvaders. Top repositions. Bottom reshapes the board AND slows invaders. Gale element is unusual for Root — with reduce-by-1 decay, one Gale point lingers but won't reach Gale tier 1 (4) without multiple Gale cards.

cards.name: Dread Awakening

bottom.desc: Generate 9 Fear. The next Fear Action drawn this encounter is from the next Dread Level pool.

cards.design_note: Fear engine card. Top's 4 Fear is the best single-turn Fear generation available to Root. Bottom's 9 Fear is nearly 2 Fear Actions AND upgrades the next draw. Worth dissolving when Dread Level is about to advance. Double Shadow contributes 4 to Shadow pool on bottom (doubled) — hits Shadow tier 1 from a single play.

cards.name: Verdant Restoration

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 2 points in range 2

bottom.desc: Remove one full Corruption level from one territory in range 1 (e.g., Defiled to start of Tainted at 3 pts). Restore 2 Weave.

cards.design_note: The only Purify source in the Root pool. Bottom drops a full level: Desecrated to 8pts, Defiled to 3pts, Tainted to 0pts. Critical against territories threatening permanent Desecration. Double Mist contributes 4 Mist on bottom — hits Mist tier 1 from a single play (restore 1 Weave as threshold bonus on top of the 2 Weave from the effect).

cards.name: Ancient Communion

top.desc: Give all Natives in range 1 Shield 2 until end of next Tide

bottom.desc: Shield 2 all Natives in range 2 until end of next Tide. All Natives in range 2 deal +2 damage on their counter-attack this Tide.

cards.design_note: Native interaction card. Top protects adjacent Natives before a Ravage Tide (you see the action card previewed). Bottom is worth dissolving when you have multiple Natives across several territories: shielded, boosted Natives deal 5 damage each (3 base + 2 boost), enough to kill Marchers and Ironclads. With player-assigned counter-attack, you direct the boosted damage optimally.

cards.name: Root Terror

bottom.desc: Generate 3 Fear. Push up to 2 invaders in range 2 back toward their spawn point.

cards.design_note: Fear + disruption. Top is reliable Fear. Bottom combines Fear with Push — pushing invaders from M-row back to A-row buys a full turn of breathing room. Worth dissolving when invaders are approaching I1 and you need to reset their position.

cards.name: Boundless Growth

bottom.desc: Place 3 Presence anywhere in range 2 (can be split across territories)

cards.design_note: The Root threshold monster. Triple Root contributes 6 to the pool on bottom play (3x2 doubled) — that alone hits Root tier 1 (4) and nearly tier 2 (7). Bottom's 3 Presence can establish board control across a wide area in one action.

cards.name: Rise, Ancient One

bottom.desc: Awaken 2 dormant cards. For each card awakened this way, choose: play its top immediately for free, or return it to an active hand slot.

cards.design_note: Awakened-rarity Awaken with a choice. Bottom is one of the most decision-dense plays in the deck: chain-play two top effects immediately OR reactivate two cards for future use. Three different elements contribute 6 total on bottom (doubled) — broad threshold building.

cards.name: Lattice of Life

top.desc: Place 1 Presence in range 1. For each territory adjacent to this new Presence that also has Presence, generate 2 Fear.

bottom.desc: Place 2 Presence in up to 2 territories in range 2. Double Network Fear passive income for the rest of this encounter.

cards.design_note: Ancient rarity. Top scales with network density. Bottom's permanent Network Fear doubling is build-defining. Root+Root+Mist contributes 6 on bottom, hitting Root tier 1 and building toward tier 2.

cards.name: The Deep Remembers

top.desc: Reduce Corruption by 3 points in range 1. If this reduces a territory from Tainted to Clean, generate 3 Fear.

bottom.desc: Fully cleanse one territory in range 2 (drop to 0 Corruption points). Generate Fear equal to the Corruption level that was cleared x 4.

cards.design_note: Ancient rarity. Full cleanse (0 points) on any territory in range 2 is the most powerful cleanse in the game. Clearing Desecrated generates 12 Fear — over two Fear Actions and a huge Dread push. This card can swing a losing game.

cards.name: Living Forest

top.desc: Shield 3 all Natives in range 2. Any Native with Shield 3 that survives this Tide gains +1 permanent HP for this encounter.

bottom.desc: All Natives on the board fully heal to max HP. Each Native deals double damage on counter-attacks for the rest of this encounter. Generate 1 Fear per living Native.

cards.design_note: Ancient rarity Native build-around. Bottom is the 'win with Natives' card: 6 alive Natives = 6 Fear + permanent double counter-attack (6 damage per Native with player-assigned targeting). Requires sustained Native protection investment.
